answer: The Austin 311 public data shows fluctuating trends in service requests over the last 24 months. For example, on September 3, 2024, there were 1,829 requests, while on May 29, 2025, there were 1,812 requests. Other notable counts include 1,274 requests on September 25, 2023, and 1,253 requests on June 5, 2023. These variations highlight changes in service demand across different quarters.
